/usr/bin/c++ -g "CMakeFiles/flexlm-broker.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o flexlm-broker  src/broker/libbroker_lib.a src/pool/libpool_lib.a src/health/libhealth_lib.a src/tracker/libtracker_lib.a src/api/libapi_lib.a src/common/libcommon_lib.a -lpq src/pool/libpool_lib.a src/tracker/libtracker_lib.a -lpq src/common/libcommon_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 -lcpp-httplib
